About Zaعtar

Zaعtar is a local streetwear brand built on identity, culture, and self-expression.
We create simple, bold, and comfortable pieces inspired by modern street style.

🎯 Mission

Culture. Comfort. Identity.

🚀 Vision

To lead streetwear with authentic local style.
